note: SNG-131: the living substrate — 'the quick', the green current. The nature-keepers' parallel to the fabricated precursor substrate. A distinct deep-power family (NOT antipodal to precursor on the ring — rootkin sits on the death↔life diameter, seraphic/abyssal on angelic↔demonic; they are different axes, two deep families, not two poles of one). These route through their own living_current gate, mirroring precursor.

abilities.name: Quicken the Ground
abilities.narrationHints: You press your hand to the earth and it ANSWERS — the living current beneath everything stirring up to meet you, green and enormous and older than the nanites.
abilities.description: The first touch of the living substrate — waking the green current in the ground, the deep life-layer the Rootkin never gave up as their kin gave up the nanites. Where the substrate-keepers channel the fabricated deep, the Rootkin channel the living one.
abilities.notFor: It wakes the living, not the made — dead stone and machinery do not answer. And the current answers a true rootkin touch; forced or faithless, the ground stays asleep.

tree.name: Quicken the Ground
tree.grants: Wake the living current in the ground, drawing on the deep life-substrate.
tree.cannot: It touches only the living substrate, it answers only a true channel, and what you wake, you must tend — roused life does not simply lie back down.

tree.name: The Ground Answers
tree.grants: Hold the waking through a scene rather than a moment, and feel BACK along it — the roused current reports what is rooted near it: who passed and how recently, what grows under the surface, what living thing lies buried and still breathing.
tree.cannot: Feeling back is not seeing — you get presence and direction, never faces; the made and the dead remain absent from it; and holding the waking costs continuously.

tree.name: The Deep Rousing
tree.grants: Wake the living current across a whole rooted district. Ground once woken by you answers your touch faster ever after, and the roused life will carry others — a party moving over ground you have quickened travels rested, fed by what you woke.
tree.cannot: A district roused is a district AWAKE; the Rootkin hold that what you wake you tend, and the GM will name what the waking costs the land; ground worked too often goes sullen and answers slower, not faster.

abilities.name: The Green Road
abilities.narrationHints: You step into the living current and it CARRIES you — root to root, grove to grove, along the green road that runs under the whole world where the life-substrate never thinned.
abilities.description: The deeper living-current working — moving through the connected life-substrate itself, the green road that links every rooted place. The Rootkin's equivalent of the precursor apertures, but living: not a door cut in the substrate, a vine followed through it.
abilities.notFor: It travels the living, not the void — it reaches only where life-substrate runs unbroken; a dead zone, a machine-city, a burned waste has no green road through it. And you arrive rooted, not free; the road holds you as it carries you.

tree.name: The Green Road
tree.grants: Travel the connected living substrate — the green road between rooted places.
tree.cannot: It reaches only where life runs unbroken, it cannot cross the dead or the made, and the current that carries you also claims you for the length of the road.

tree.name: The Deep Road
tree.grants: Carry others along the green road — a party moves as one, rooted place to rooted place. And the road begins to open toward places you have never walked, if something living there already knows your touch.
tree.cannot: It still cannot cross the dead or the made. A longer road claims you longer; you arrive rooted and slow. Carrying others multiplies what the current takes, and when the road is choosing your destination it also chooses the pace.
